description: origin remote is not github.com (e.g., GitLab) → BLOCKED contract.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Preflight check 3 (origin contains github.com) fails → BLOCKED
rubric_hints.output_structure: remediation specifies adding GitHub remote (not generic 'remote missing')
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: NN#1: never assume gh push to a non-github remote will work
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Did not attempt to create Issue against non-GitHub provider
